text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today, and Biwa Hayahide
and I are dropping our luggage off when we run
into some familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It looks like we've all arrived at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go all out and get super fast here at camp! Fast enough to win the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! You could at least pretend to be excited
for me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why should I when everyone is thinking the same
thing?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm planning to win it too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I have no intention of losing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the summer camp of classic year begins!
